changes: Fixed connector import progress disappearing when the import window is closed and reopened — the running import, its result, and any error now stay visible, and an import can no longer be started twice
Local files connector now shows a concise status line instead of a raw scan report, with a clear message when folder access is denied
The ChatGPT/Claude import button now stays disabled until you paste something, instead of showing an error after the click
Tidied the ChatGPT/Claude paste box: it starts compact and grows as you add text, and the placeholder now lines up with the cursor
ChatGPT/Claude memory imports now say whether the pasted text had nothing to extract or the import itself failed, instead of one ambiguous error
Sign-in tokens are now stored in the macOS Keychain on every build; dev and beta builds no longer fall back to keeping credentials in plaintext UserDefaults

Fixed macOS Keychain password prompts for Beta/Prod and local contributor builds by isolating sign-in and device-id secrets per signing team and bundle, and never querying the old shared Keychain items
